name: Socat
description: Multipurpose relay that establishes bidirectional byte streams between two endpoints. Tool: http://www.dest-unreach.org/socat/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #11 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Socat output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Socat output file to parse instead of running it live.
